levelName: Level 55: For Loops - Multiplication Table of 5
puzzleDescription: Learn how to generate a multiplication table. Your goal is to print the products of 5 from 5x1 up to 5x10.
objective: Use a for loop to print the multiplication table of 5 (5, 10, 15... 50).
hints: Start your loop at 1 and end at 10: 'for (int i = 1; i <= 10; i++)'.
Inside the loop, multiply 5 by the loop variable 'i'.
